name: Union Pacific Corporation
description: Union Pacific Corporation is one of America's leading transportation companies, operating the Union Pacific Railroad. Its network connects 23 states in the western two-thirds of the United States, serving as a critical link in the global supply chain. The company transports a diverse range of goods, including agricultural products, automotive parts, chemicals, and intermodal freight. With a focus on safety, efficiency, and sustainability, Union Pacific provides essential logistics solutions that support the U.S. economy and international trade through its extensive rail infrastructure and strategic connections to Mexico and Canada.

investment_theses.company_type: Logistics / Rail Transport for US Industrial Goods
